3141240.name: Limit Shoot
3141240.description:
The "Limit Shoot" is the vertical scroll type Shoot em Ups Game. The player ride the high-performance fighter jet and fight an enemy nation that has received alien technology.

The fighter jet have durability, so it won't be shot down in one shot. And the damage can be recovered with get the items. Attack enemies with missiles and lasers, and can protect enemy bullets use the shield.

This game have three levels( Easy, Normal, Hard ). Both the beginners and the gamers can enjoy it.

A large number of unique enemies will appear in each stage. At the end of the stage, a huge boss battleship awaits, so large it doesn't fit on the screen.

In this game, it's important to "aim and hit". Also, sometimes the enemies attacks (enemy bullets) more better to protect than to avoid them.

The how to use missiles, laser, and shield, is the key to winning. Please come experience the next generation of the Shoot em Ups Game.

【 How to play 】

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
